evals.prompt: Generate a financial report for Apple (AAPL) using Berkshire Hathaway investment principles and tell me if it's a good investment.
evals.expected_output: Two markdown files should be generated: evaluaciones/AAPL/informe-tecnico.md (technical report with ~100+ financial metrics) and evaluaciones/AAPL/informe-berkshire.md (Berkshire analysis with valuation and investment recommendation). The skill should be triggered automatically due to 'informe' and ticker mention.

evals.prompt: Analiza Microsoft (MSFT). Quiero un análisis completo con valoración técnica y evaluación de inversión según Berkshire.
evals.expected_output: Both reports generated for MSFT. The workflow should extract MSFT from the parenthetical mention, generate yfinance technical report, then create Berkshire valuation analysis. Files: evaluaciones/MSFT/informe-tecnico.md and evaluaciones/MSFT/informe-berkshire.md

evals.prompt: ticker: GOOGL - dame un informe y análisis de inversión basado en principios de Berkshire Hathaway.
evals.expected_output: Explicit ticker format. Workflow extracts GOOGL from 'ticker: GOOGL', generates both reports. Files: evaluaciones/GOOGL/informe-tecnico.md and evaluaciones/GOOGL/informe-berkshire.md

evals.prompt: Should I buy Tesla? Run a complete analysis including technical financials and value investing assessment.
evals.expected_output: Natural mention without explicit ticker format. Skill should extract TSLA from context ('Tesla'), generate both reports automatically. Files: evaluaciones/TSLA/informe-tecnico.md and evaluaciones/TSLA/informe-berkshire.md
